basic_details.job_title: DCPU Jamui Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 16 Housekeeper, Cook and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Jamui (DCPU Jamui)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Jamui (DCPU Jamui) Various Part Time and Support Posts Notification 2026 has been released on the official website jamui.nic.in. A total of 16 vacancies have been announced through the DCPU Jamui Various Part Time and Support Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: UR Male 18-37, UR Female 18-40, EBC 18-40, SC 18-42. Age as on 01 April 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: 10+2 with Diploma in elementary education (D.El.Ed.) or B.Ed., 10+2 with Diploma/Degree in Art & Craft/Music, 10+2 with Diploma/Degree in Yoga/Sports/Athletics/Physical Education, 8th Pass
qualification.details: Educator (Part Time): 10+2 with Diploma in elementary education (D.El.Ed.) or B.Ed. from a recognized university. Art & Craft cum Music Teacher (Part Time): 10+2 with Diploma/Degree in Art & Craft/Music from a recognized University. PT Instructor cum Yoga Trainer (Part Time): 10+2 with Diploma/Degree in Yoga/Sports/Athletics/Physical Education. Cook: 8th Pass. Helper-cum-night watchman: 8th Pass. Housekeeper (Sweeper): 8th Pass.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Art & Craft cum Music Teacher (Part Time)
PT Instructor cum Yoga Trainer (Part Time)

salary_details.details: Educator (Part Time): Rs. 10000/- Per Month Art & Craft cum Music Teacher (Part Time): Rs. 10000/- Per Month PT Instructor cum Yoga Trainer (Part Time): Rs. 10000/- Per Month Cook: Rs. 9930/- Per Month Helper-cum-night watchman: Rs. 7944/- Per Month Housekeeper (Sweeper): Rs. 7944/- Per Month

selection_process: Merit list based on percentage of marks in minimum technical qualification
higher degree marks and interview. Interview for posts 1-3 (40 marks). Interview only for posts 4-6 (40 marks). Final merit list out of 100 marks.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://jamui.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
